Metadata.title: Feyzo Logistics | Freight Forwarding & Customs Clearance
Metadata.description: Feyzo Logistics offers international logistics, freight forwarding, and customs clearance—with a focus on shipping to Syria and coordination through Lattakia port. Reliable cross-border cargo, transparent communication, and end-to-end supply chain support.
Metadata.ogDescription: Feyzo Logistics offers international logistics, freight forwarding, and customs clearance—with a focus on shipping to Syria and coordination through Lattakia port. Reliable cross-border cargo and supply chain support.

Hero.headline:
Streamlined Logistics
Delivered with Excellence
Hero.heroImageAlt: Logistics and freight operations — Feyzo Logistics
Hero.subheadline: Your trusted partner for reliable, efficient, and cost-effective logistics solutions. We connect your business to the world with precision and care.

Services.title: What we do
Services.subtitle: Core capabilities designed around reliability and transparency.

items.title: Freight forwarding
items.description: Air, ocean, and road options with clear milestones and proactive updates.

items.title: Warehousing
items.description: Secure storage, inventory visibility, and fulfillment aligned to your SLAs.

items.title: Customs & compliance
items.description: Documentation and clearance support to reduce delays at borders.

items.title: Last-mile delivery
items.description: Final delivery scheduling that respects your customers’ expectations.

About.title: About Feyzo
About.body: We are an independent logistics partner focused on predictable handoffs, honest communication, and measurable delivery performance. Whether you ship regionally or across borders, we align our operations with your timelines and reporting needs.

Contact.title: Ready to ship?
Contact.body: Tell us about your lanes, volumes, and deadlines. We will respond with a clear next step.
Contact.address: Latakia Governorate, The Goldsmiths' Market, Syria
